options.label: unnamed-chunk-20
options.fig.alt: A scatterplot graph showing the number of settled stars over time in days for each substrate treatment. Each day is plotted with a dot and a smoothed line was added to show the linear regression over time. The treatments are labeled on the legend (control, rhodomonas only, sterilized sea grapes, and non-sterilized sea grapes). The sea grape treatments show a much faster settlement rate over the experiment.

options.label: unnamed-chunk-21
options.fig.alt: A boxplot showing the proportion of settled stars in each treatment at the end of the experiment. Legend corresponds to the treatments(control, rhodomonas only, sterilized sea grapes, and non-sterilized sea grapes). Non-sterilized sea grapes had a much higher proportion of settled stars compared to the other groups.
